title: Magically Snappy Algerian Beef Tagine
description: A romantic Algerian dish featuring feather blade beef, this recipe is garlicky and snappy, perfect for a special occasion, and is high protein friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine beef, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the beef mixture to the pot, and cook until the beef is browned on all sides.
Add chicken broth to the pot, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Remove the pot from the heat, and let it cool slightly.
Submerge the pot in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the dish has cooled, transfer it to a bamboo tray to serve.
Garnish with fresh parsley, and serve immediately.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
